summary.key_theme: 市場高度期待 GE Aerospace 即將公布的財報表現，且受惠於國防與推進系統業務的強勁需求及 AI 技術帶來的營運效率提升。

bullish.title: GE Aerospace (GE) Earnings Expected to Grow: What to Know Ahead of Next Week's Release
bullish.reason: 市場預期 GE 具備財報超預期的關鍵條件，包括強勁的訂單積壓與營運效率改善，為股價提供正面支撐。

bullish.title: GE Gains From Strength in Defense & Propulsion Unit: Will the Momentum Last?
bullish.reason: 國防與推進系統部門的強勁合約與利潤率擴張，是推動公司長期成長的核心驅動力。

bullish.title: Jim Cramer on GE Aerospace: “I Think the Stock Is a Buy”
bullish.reason: 知名財經評論員 Jim Cramer 公開看好並建議買入，增強了市場對該股的信心。

bullish.title: AI Makes Strange Bedfellows of Ford and GE Aerospace. Here’s Why It Matters.
bullish.reason: GE Aerospace 透過 AI 技術提升製造效率與利潤率，顯示公司在數位轉型上的競爭優勢。

bullish.title: GE (GE) Is Considered a Good Investment by Brokers: Is That True?
bullish.reason: 券商平均評級維持在「買入」，反映機構投資人對其基本面與未來成長的認可。

bearish.title: GE Aerospace (GE) Sees a More Significant Dip Than Broader Market: Some Facts to Know
bearish.reason: 股價出現短期回調，跌幅大於大盤，反映部分獲利了結賣壓。

bearish.title: Top Research Reports for Bank of America, GE Aerospace & T-Mobile
bearish.reason: 分析師報告指出公司面臨營運成本上升與競爭壓力，需持續關注利潤率表現。

neutral.title: Is It Too Late To Consider General Electric (GE) After A 69% One-Year Surge?
neutral.reason: 探討股價一年內大漲 69% 後的估值合理性，提醒投資人注意市場是否過熱。

neutral.title: GE Aerospace : Quick Six with Engineer Gloria Garcia
neutral.reason: 關於員工與企業文化的介紹，對股價無直接財務影響。

neutral.title: The GE Family Divided: Comparing Valuations, Growth Rates, and Analyst Sentiment Across 3 Sectors
neutral.reason: 對 GE 分拆後各業務板塊的比較分析，屬於中性的產業研究報告。
